text:
34. Copies of memorandum and articles, etc. to be given to members on request being made by them.-
A company shall on payment of fee, send a copy of each of the following documents to a member within seven days of
the request being made by him-
(1) the memorandum;
(2) the articles;
(3) every agreement and every resolution referred to in sub-section (1) of section 117, if and so far as they have not
been embodied in the memorandum and articles.
section_title: 34. Copies of memorandum and articles, etc. to be given to members on request being made by them.-
